headline: DuPont Wins 2026 IRI Innovation Excellence Award
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced it was named the co-winner, along with Qnity Electronics, of the 2026 Innovation Excellence Award for Outstanding Innovative Culture from the Innovation Research Interchange (IRI), the innovation division of the National Association of Manufacturers (NAM).
